reviewer: agent matrix pass (runner-evidenced + live browser run, revision 2)

rubric.evidence: conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/code-embeddings/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/code-embeddings/mobile.png

LIVE browser run (WASM, real download of ~162 MB): query "reverse a string" ranked the Python reverse-string snippet #1 at cosine 0.877, 10 snippets ranked, 768-d vectors, 10x10 cosine matrix (100 cells) rendered. Node cross-check: NL query "add two numbers together" ranked python-add 0.776 > js-sum 0.720 > factorial 0.248; cross-language clone py-add vs js-sum = 0.778. Output shape + semantic sanity confirmed real.
rubric.notes: io-shape-semantic manually confirmed via live run — the correct code rises to #1 for a natural-language query and cross-language clones score high.

responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass (overflow=0, clipped=0, console+network clean on both). Agent read reports/responsive/screens/code-embeddings/{desktop,mobile}.png: desktop 1280x800 and mobile 360x740 both render the design system cleanly, text wraps, no horizontal overflow, at-a-glance table and controls legible. support flipped to ok/ok.
rubric.notes: Both-class agent matrix pass complete. Sub-24px targets are secondary example-query chips; primary controls (query input, Search, textareas) are full-size.
auto-checkable parts pass; manual-evidenced parts need an agent to Read the screenshot and confirm real output / controls / parity.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use flexbox/grid with flex-wrap:wrap, repeat(auto-fit, minmax()) responsive tracks, logical properties, and min-inline-size:0 on flex items containing long unbreakable code so they shrink instead of overflowing.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — .grid-2 uses grid repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px,1fr)); code textareas/inputs set min-inline-size:0; the query row is flex-wrap:wrap. Live responsive scan: overflow=0 on both desktop (1280) and mobile (360).

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Wide content (similarity matrix, code snippets) must scroll inside its own overflow-x:auto container rather than spilling the page.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — .matrix-scroll and .code-snip use overflow-x:auto; the page body never scrolls horizontally.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: clipped=0 both classes; matrix (100 cells) scrolls within its container in the live run

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce load/progress/ready/error in a role=status aria-live region; every button and control has an accessible name and label.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — shared createModelLoader status is role=status aria-live; each page has role=status regions for search/dup/gen; every control is labelled. buttons-have-names=pass, live-status-region=pass, images-have-alt=pass.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep inference off the main thread so interaction latency (INP) stays low; do not run the embedding forward pass on the UI thread.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all inference runs in a Web Worker (models/code-embeddings/worker.js); the main thread only does light cosine/PCA maths over already-computed vectors.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance inference-off-main-thread=pass; new Worker in codeembed.js

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css (invariant 6).

openQuestions: Keyboard focus order + visible focus across the four ladder pages was not exhaustively driven headlessly — worth a manual keyboard pass.
The multi-model page loads TinyLlama (~0.6 GB) on demand; its explanation quality on the WASM path is slow but functional — worth timing on a real mobile device.

followUpGoals.goal: Time the multi-model retrieve→TinyLlama-explain path on a real constrained mobile device and record RTF/latency; consider a smaller explainer LLM option if WASM generation is too slow.
Add a Wild rung variant that clusters a whole snippet bank by intent (k-means over code embeddings) to visualise language-agnostic code families.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for code-embeddings (jinaai/jina-embeddings-v2-base-code, feature-extraction, WASM q8). Runnability proven in Node (correct NL→code ranking + cross-language clone scores) AND in a live headless-Chrome run (real ~162 MB download, query "reverse a string" → Python reverse #1 at 0.877, clean console/network). Conformance: 14/14 auto-tested pass, 0 fail, 0 blocked, 9 manual-evidenced now agent-verified. Responsive: ok/ok on desktop+mobile with screenshots read. modern-web-guidance ids css-layout, overflow-clipping-control, accessibility, identify-inp-causes, cross-document-transitions applied.
